# Offseason To-Do Checklist {#sec-offeasonChecklist}

1. Run `./R-scripts/process_projections.R` to combine projected points from the most recent season with those from previous seasons
1. Run `download-football-data.qmd` after the NFL Draft to update all data
1. Save data in repository (delete any data files greater than 50 MB); save backups in `OneDrive` (`\Teaching\Courses\Fantasy Football\`) and OSF: <https://osf.io/k9vw3/overview>
1. Update current year in all code
1. Re-run all analyses, re-save model objects (`bayesianMixedModelFit.RData`; `betaRegression.RData`; `monteCarloSim_results.RData`), and update interpretive text
